# CWE-22 negative: taint-tracked path traversal with filepath.Clean
lang: go
file: CWE-22-taint-safe.go
variant: taint
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

func ServeFile(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	path := r.URL.Query().Get("path")
	safe := filepath.Clean(path)
	_ = os.Open(safe)
}
